question: How many shipments are there in the city of "Passaic"?  city_name refers to city name
orig_question: How many accounts are there in the district of "Pisek"?  A2 refers to district name
orig_masked: How many [T1] are there in the [T5] of "[V1]"?  [C24] refers to [C24]; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]
gold_sql: SELECT count(T1.ship_id) FROM shipment as T1 INNER JOIN city as T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id WHERE T2.city_name = 'Passaic'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'Pisek'

question: How many movies have comedy genre? comedy genre refers to movie.genre = 'Comedy';
orig_question: How many heroes have stealth power? stealth power refers to power_name = 'stealth';
orig_masked: How many [C12] have [V1] [C31]? [V1] [C31] refers to [C31] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C31]
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(title) from movie WHERE genre = 'Comedy'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.hero_id) FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id WHERE T2.power_name = 'Stealth'

question: How many female athletes have a Gold medal?  Female refers to gender = 'F'
orig_question: How many female customers have a junior credit card?  Female refers to gender = 'F'
orig_masked: How many [C12] [T3] have a [V1] [T2]?  [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V2]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C8]; [V2] is a value of the column [C12]
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN competitor_event as T2 ON T1.id=T2.competitor_id INNER JOIN medal as T3 ON T2.medal_id = T3.id WHERE T3.medal_name = 'Gold' AND T1.gender = 'F'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T3.type = 'junior'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For the client who applied 98832 USD loan in 1996/1/3, when was his/her birthday?
orig_masked: For the [T3] who applied [V1] [T6] in [V2], when was his/her [C9]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C34]; [V2] is a value of the column [C35]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T4.birth_date FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T1.date = '1996-01-03' AND T1.amount = 98832
note: The applied part here makes this a difficult example to find a good alternative for.

question: How often, in total, did customer number 387 order for all of the orders in 2021?
orig_question: How much, in total, did client number 617 pay for all of the transactions in 1998?
orig_masked: How much, in total, did [T3] [C10] [V2] [T8] for all of the [T8] in [V1]? ; [V1] is a value of the column [C51]; [V2] is a value of the column [C10]
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.order_id) FROM customer as T1 INNER JOIN cust_order as T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.order_date)= '2021' AND T1.customer_id = 387
orig_gold_sql: SELECT SUM(T3.amount) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T4.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T3.date)= '1998' AND T1.client_id = 617

question: Which person has the shortest height? shortest height refers to MIN(height_meters);
orig_question: Which football player has the shortest height? shortest height refers to MIN(height);
orig_masked: Which [T4] has the shortest [C122]? shortest [C122] refers to MIN([C122]);
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM person WHERE height_meters = (SELECT height_meters FROM person WHERE height_meters IS NOT NULL ORDER by height_meters ASC LIMIT 1)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT player_name FROM player ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1

question: Provide the full names of Algeria competitors.  Algeria competitors refers to region_name = 'Algeria';
orig_question: Provide the full names of vampire heroes.  vampire heroes refers to race = 'Vampire';
orig_masked: Provide the [C20] of [V1] [T9].  [V1] [T9] refers to [C17] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C17]
gold_sql: SELECT T1.full_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T3.region_name = 'Algeria'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Vampire'

question: How many pages does Alan Dean Foster author have?  Alan Dean Foster author refers to author_name = 'Alan Dean Foster';
orig_question: How many powers does Amazo hero have?  Amazo hero refers to superhero_name = 'Amazo';
orig_masked: How many [C13] does [V1] [T9] have?  [V1] [T9] refers to [C28] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: Alan Dean Foster author refers to author_name = 'Alan Dean Foster';
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(T3.num_pages) FROM author as T1 INNER JOIN book_author as T2 ON T1.author_id = T2.author_id INNER JOIN book as T3 ON T2.book_id = T3.book_id WHERE T1.author_name = 'Alan Dean Foster'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.power_id) FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superhero AS T2 ON T1.hero_id = T2.id WHERE T2.superhero_name = 'Amazo'

question: What is the customer name of the customer who made $6066.78 payment in 2004-10-19?
orig_question: What is the disposition id of the client who made 5100 USD transaction in 1998/9/2?
orig_masked: What is the [C15] of the [T1] who made [V1] [T8] in [V2]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C48]; [V2] is a value of the column [C51]
gold_sql: SELECT T1.customerName FROM customers as T1 INNER JOIN payments as T2 ON T1.customerNumber = T2.customerNumber WHERE T2.amount = 6066.78 AND T2.paymentdate = '2004-10-19'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.disp_id FROM disp AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.date='1997-08-20' AND T3.amount = 5100

question: How many Algeria competitors are there?  Algeria competitors refers to region_name = 'Algeria'
orig_question: How many vampire superheroes are there?  vampire superheroes refers to race = 'Vampire'
orig_masked: How many [V1] [T9] are there?  [V1] [T9] refers to [C17] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C17]
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.full_name) FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id=T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T3.region_name = 'Algeria'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.superhero_name) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Vampire'
